creator: dohzono@axion-software.com
text:
I have reported problem and patch [*1], and they
are once accepted but patch disappeared now. 

The patch is: 

ports/mail/squirrelmail/files/patch-functions__i18n.php

Without this patch, we can't retrieve Japanese
file names.

[*1]; http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133652
